datasync.locationhdfs.qopconfiguration.C: The Quality of Protection (QOP) configuration specifies the Remote Procedure Call (RPC) and data transfer privacy settings configured on the Hadoop Distributed File System (HDFS) cluster.

datasync.locationhdfs.qopconfiguration.D.Description: The data transfer protection setting configured on the HDFS cluster. This setting corresponds to your `dfs.data.transfer.protection` setting in the `hdfs-site.xml` file on your Hadoop cluster.

datasync.locationhdfs.qopconfiguration.R.Description: The Remote Procedure Call (RPC) protection setting configured on the HDFS cluster. This setting corresponds to your `hadoop.rpc.protection` setting in your `core-site.xml` file on your Hadoop cluster.
